title: age-group — authorization policies
description: One policy — AgeGroupPolicy — narrows by scope suffix (`.any` / `.tenant`). Every tenant member can READ age groups in their active tenant (they are UI reference data every enrollment + roster + team form depends on). Only admins + owners can WRITE. Seeded rows have extra guardrails: they cannot be deleted (only edited); `is_seeded` cannot be flipped by any caller.

abilities.scope: resolved via ScopeSuffixResolver — `.tenant` narrows to the caller's active tenant; `.any` unrestricted (platform_admin only). Every tenant role gets `.tenant` by default because age groups are UI reference data (every enrollment + roster form reads them).
single-row check by suffix. `.tenant` requires the AgeGroup's tenant_id to match the caller's active tenant.

admin or owner in the active tenant. Also gated by the `age_group_slot` entitlement — the observer decrements on create + refuses with AGE_GROUP_QUOTA_EXCEEDED when the slot is exhausted. Also gated by `age_group_custom` — Small tier is locked to the seeded catalog entirely, so `age_groups.create` returns 402 AGE_GROUP_CUSTOM_DISABLED on that tier.

admin or owner + tenant carries `age_group_sport_specific` entitlement (Enterprise-only). Guards the `sport_key` field on creation — when the caller omits sport_key (null = generic), any tier can create; when the caller sets sport_key, this permission + entitlement gate the write.

admin or owner. Mutable fields: name, description, slug, color, gender_category, sort_order. Bounds + cutoff + sport_key edits require the higher-privilege `age_groups.update.bounds` + `age_groups.update.cutoff` + `age_groups.update.sport_key` permissions because they can invalidate downstream Athlete eligibility.
admin or owner. Separated from base update — bounds changes fire AgeGroupBoundsChanged which is audit-critical (7-year retention) and may cascade to Athlete eligibility recomputation.
admin or owner. Same reasoning as updateBounds — cutoff changes reshape eligibility outcomes without touching the bounds themselves.
admin or owner + tenant carries `age_group_sport_specific` entitlement. Refused when the AgeGroup is currently referenced by active Athletes (Wave 3+ enforcement).
admin or owner. Flip is_default within a (tenant, organization, sport_key) tuple. Auto-demotes the previous default in same transaction.

admin or owner. Refused when is_default=true (CANNOT_DELETE_DEFAULT_AGE_GROUP), when is_seeded=true (CANNOT_DELETE_SEEDED_AGE_GROUP), OR when any inbound row references the AgeGroup (AGE_GROUP_IN_USE).
admin or owner. Only within the 1095-day archived retention window.
owner only. Same guards as archive — plus hard-delete happens only via PurgeArchivedAgeGroupsJob after retention window.
every tenant role. Read-only endpoint that answers 'which age group does a hypothetical DOB + sport_key fall into?'. Widely used by enrollment previews + team-invite flows — hence broad access.
platform_admin only. Cross-tenant read for support tooling.
